title: Action Queue Entry
description: One line in data/queue/actions.jsonl. Tracks actions queued from the interactive dashboard for Claude to process.

id.description: Unique action ID with ISO timestamp suffix

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the action was queued

target_id.description: The record ID to act on (e.g., inv-2026-03-23-001). Empty string for trigger-triage.

requested_by.description: Email address of the user who requested the action

processed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the action was processed by Claude

result.description: Human-readable outcome of the action processing
